stemHtml: SOP can contribute to avoiding, reducing and managing threats and/or errors in daily flight operations. How is that achieved?

options.a: Reliable behaviour of crew members acting according to SOP reduces the stress in individuals and makes them less prone to commit errors.
options.b: The creation of SOP is not a suitable means to reduce threats; they can only serve to avoid errors or mitigate their effects.
options.c: Pilots violating SOP will immediately be excluded from flying duties, improving flight safety.
options.d: SOPs have to be developed for the detection of latent (organisational) threats.
